title: Every Jorr Counts — Jorr Counter by DesiJorrKhana

sections.text: In the akhada, every jorr counts. But who's counting?
sections.label: DESIJORRKHANA — JORR COUNTER · अखाड़े का हिसाब

sections.text: You push through your set, and lose the count halfway.
sections.label: Lost count again?

sections.text: Jorr Counter watches you through your camera, and counts every rep for you. Hands free.
sections.label: Hands-free counting

sections.text: Track your sets, take timed breaks, and share your scorecard with the khana.
sections.label: Purana tareeqa vs Jorr Counter

sections.text: No taps. No wearables. Just you, and your jorr.
sections.label: 0 taps

sections.text: Desi Jorr Khana. Open it in your browser, and start counting.
sections.label: Every jorr counts.
